fields.name: Ghanshyam Desale
fields.tagline: Engineering high-performance digital products for fintech and enterprise platforms.

fields.title: Bajaj Finserv Bill Payment Platform
fields.description: Enterprise-scale Angular Progressive Web App for bill payments and financial services, handling complex offline scenarios, native bridge integrations, and high-fidelity analytics.
fields.challenge: Maintaining analytics continuity across Angular PWA, native Android, and iOS app contexts while handling complex offline/online state transitions for payment flows.
fields.solution: Designed a bridge-aware event schema that serializes analytics payloads before handoff, with a local queue that flushes when connectivity is restored.

fields.title: Merchant Platform
fields.description: End-to-end merchant onboarding and payment management platform with complex business validation workflows and reusable component libraries.
fields.challenge: Standardizing diverse merchant onboarding flows with complex validation rules across different merchant categories.
fields.solution: Abstracted business rules into a configurable validation engine with a reusable form component library that adapts to merchant type.

fields.title: Branches Platform
fields.description: Branch-based bill payment and service management platform with dynamic configuration and version-controlled feature rollouts.
fields.challenge: Managing feature parity and version consistency across hundreds of branches with different configuration requirements.
fields.solution: Built a dynamic configuration loader that fetches branch-specific feature flags and version manifests at runtime.

fields.title: MyAshiyana Management System
fields.description: Comprehensive society management platform for resident management, facility tracking, and real-time service coordination.
fields.challenge: Providing real-time facility status and resident communication in a system serving multi-tower residential complexes.
fields.solution: Implemented polling-based real-time updates with optimistic UI updates and smart cache invalidation.

fields.title: B.E. Mechanical Engineering
fields.organization: Shri Gulabrao Deokar College of Engineering
fields.description: Graduated with CGPA 7.96. Strong analytical and systems-thinking foundation, pivot into software engineering.

fields.title: Full Stack Developer Training
fields.description: Intensive training in modern web development covering frontend, backend, databases, and deployment practices.

fields.title: Angular Developer
fields.description: First professional role building Angular applications. Developed production-quality UI components, REST API integrations, and reusable modules.

fields.title: Angular Developer
fields.description: Leading Angular PWA development for Bajaj Finserv bill payment platform. Driving Autopay module, IndexedDB architecture, native bridge integration, and analytics systems.

fields.title: Led Autopay Module — End-to-End
fields.description: Owned the complete delivery of the Autopay module for Bajaj Finserv: requirements, architecture decisions, implementation, testing, and production release coordination.
fields.highlight: Full ownership from spec to production

fields.title: IndexedDB Offline Architecture
fields.description: Designed and implemented the IndexedDB caching layer enabling resilient offline-first payment flows.

fields.title: Multi-Platform Analytics Instrumentation
fields.description: Implemented CleverTap, GA4, and GTM tracking across PWA and native bridge surfaces with a unified event schema.
